series_metadata.series_description: Transcripts and documents that were submitted by applicants who never completed licensure application process.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper transcripts will be scanned into the electronic record of the applicant. The electronic record will be maintained for a period of 1 year after the date the application was submitted. Then destroyed. ; Electronic: The electronic record will be maintained for a period of 1 year after the date the application was submitted. Then destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
